title: Create:Dreams
description: This is a create addon that adds a more dreamy aspect to it. This is for forge 1.20.1 only
body:
# Create: Dreams
### Uses
The uses are few for now but will grow later. So far you can make some new items and blocks.
### New Items
The new items include
- Dream Alloy - Make Dream Casing
- Dream Casing
- Dream Core - Make Dream Casing
- Dreamy Sword - A whole new sword
- Over Charger
- Charged Diamonds + Emeralds
